---
title: "λέξις: a Quarto slide template"
format:
  html:
    theme: united
    highlight-style: tango
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    # Inline all page assets so no index_files/ directory has to be committed.
    # The embedded demo iframe below opts out via data-external="1" — without
    # it, pandoc's embed step rewrites the iframe src into a data: URI
    # snapshot of the deck's HTML, which breaks it (all of the deck's own
    # relative js/css/image paths stop resolving).
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
dateWritten <- format(as.Date('2026-07-08'), format = "%B %d %Y")
today <- format(Sys.Date(), format = "%B %d %Y")
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* Styles for the landing page (index.qmd) only — not part of the slide theme. */

.github-corner:hover .octo-arm {
  animation: octocat-wave 560ms ease-in-out;
}

@keyframes octocat-wave {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0); }
  20%, 60% { transform: rotate(-25deg); }
  40%, 80% { transform: rotate(10deg); }
}

@media (max-width: 500px) {
  .github-corner:hover .octo-arm { animation: none; }
  .github-corner .octo-arm { animation: octocat-wave 560ms ease-in-out; }
}

.button {
  background-color: #007bff;
  color: white;
  padding: 10px 15px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 4px 4px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 16px;
  margin: 4px 2px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.button:hover {
  color: white;
  text-decoration: none;
}

/* Responsive 16:9 box holding the embedded demo deck. */
.demo-frame {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  padding-bottom: 56.25%;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.demo-frame iframe {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
</style>
```

<!-- The little github logo in the corner, from https://github.com/tholman/github-corners -->

<a href="https://github.com/jhelvy/quarto-lexis" class="github-corner" aria-label="View source on GitHub"><svg width="80" height="80" viewBox="0 0 250 250" style="fill:#007bff; color:#fff; position: absolute; top: 0; border: 0; right: 0;" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M0,0 L115,115 L130,115 L142,142 L250,250 L250,0 Z"></path><path d="M128.3,109.0 C113.8,99.7 119.0,89.6 119.0,89.6 C122.0,82.7 120.5,78.6 120.5,78.6 C119.2,72.0 123.4,76.3 123.4,76.3 C127.3,80.9 125.5,87.3 125.5,87.3 C122.9,97.6 130.6,101.9 134.4,103.2" fill="currentColor" style="transform-origin: 130px 106px;" class="octo-arm"></path><path d="M115.0,115.0 C114.9,115.1 118.7,116.5 119.8,115.4 L133.7,101.6 C136.9,99.2 139.9,98.4 142.2,98.6 C133.8,88.0 127.5,74.4 143.8,58.0 C148.5,53.4 154.0,51.2 159.7,51.0 C160.3,49.4 163.2,43.6 171.4,40.1 C171.4,40.1 176.1,42.5 178.8,56.2 C183.1,58.6 187.2,61.8 190.9,65.4 C194.5,69.0 197.7,73.2 200.1,77.6 C213.8,80.2 216.3,84.9 216.3,84.9 C212.7,93.1 206.9,96.0 205.4,96.6 C205.1,102.4 203.0,107.8 198.3,112.5 C181.9,128.9 168.3,122.5 157.7,114.1 C157.9,116.9 156.7,120.9 152.7,124.9 L141.0,136.5 C139.8,137.7 141.6,141.9 141.8,141.8 Z" fill="currentColor" class="octo-body"></path></svg></a>

{{< include _description.qmd >}}

## Demo

The deck below is the template you get when you install lexis. Click it and use
the arrow keys, or open it [full screen](lexis-template/lexis-demo.html).

```{=html}
<div class="demo-frame">
  <!-- data-external keeps embed-resources from inlining the deck as a data: URI -->
  <iframe src="lexis-template/lexis-demo.html" data-external="1" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```

<a href="lexis-template/lexis-template.zip" class="button">`r fa("file-zipper", height = "20px", fill = "white")` Download zip file</a>
<a href="lexis-template/lexis-demo.qmd" class="button">`r fa("file-code", height = "20px", fill = "white")` View the source</a>

## Installation

{{< include _install.qmd >}}

<a href="lexis-template/lexis-template.zip" class="button">`r fa("file-zipper", height = "20px", fill = "white")` Download zip file</a>

## Authoring conventions

{{< include _conventions.qmd >}}

## Claude Code skill

{{< include _claude.qmd >}}

## Notes

- Because a `---` slide has no heading to hang attributes on, the modifier
  shortcodes leave invisible markers that a Lua filter
  ([`_extensions/lexis/lexis.lua`](https://github.com/jhelvy/quarto-lexis/blob/main/_extensions/lexis/lexis.lua))
  hoists onto the slide's `<section>` element.
- Headings placed *inside* a fenced div, such as a column, are rendered as
  `.h1`…`.h6` styled text so they can't accidentally start a new slide.

{{< include _footer.qmd >}}
